Petition For Proposed Action; Objection To Administrator?S Status Report
Off Calendar Mar-13-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Kaller appeared by zoom for Bartholomew Murphy (administrator).

No appearance was made by Mr. Schinner. Mr. Kaller stated that he prefers to have the matter dismissed, that it is moot as there is a settlement going around and that the court has already signed an order approving the status report. The Petition for Proposed Action, etc. is off calendar.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-20-2023 Continued To Jul-24-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Kaller appeared by zoom for Bartholomew Murphy (administrator).
Augustin Pina appeared by zoom for Daniel Murphy, Joan Murphy and Margarita Murphy (beneficiaries).

Mr. Kaller stated that everybody agrees to waive bond, but they are waiting for beneficiary Michael's form. Mr. Pina stated that all three of his clients are waiving bond, and that the waivers were e-mailed to Mr. Kaller. Mr. Kaller stated that he has a status report, that everything is in a condition to close, except for the issue of allocating the properties, and asked for a four-month continuance. Status on close of estate, and status on increase of bond, or filing of waivers is continued to July 24, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration needs to be filed.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-30-2023 Continued To Mar-20-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom: James Lance Kaller, Esq. for Bartholomew Murphy (Adminsitrator).
Augustin Pina, Esq. for Rita Murphy, Daniel Murphy, and Joan Murphy (Beneficiaries).

The Court stated that before it today is status on close of the estate and status on bond, that this is a $20,000,000.00 estate that is unbonded, that Catherine Murphy waived bond, that it was originally thought that this estate was $6,000,000.00, that there was a disclaimer filed by Catherine Murphy, and that she is no longer an heir. Mr. Kaller stated that he reached out to the bonding company, that the bond is available, that they can post it quickly, and that he did reach out to Mr. Pina's clients about a waiver. Mr. Pina stated that there is a fifth beneficiary that they don't represent and that the principal attorney in his office sent additional questions to Mr. Kaller. Mr. Kaller identified the fifth beneficiary as Michael Murphy, stated that Michael Murphy is willing to waive bond, that his client is working on the accounting, that there is a lot of property, and that he will speak to Mr. Pina about distribution. Counsel confirmed for the Court that there are five beneficiaries: Michael Murphy, Bartholomew Murphy (Mr. Kaller's client), and Rita Murphy, Daniel Murphy, and Joan Murphy (Mr. Pina's clients). The Court stated that it wants the bond waivers in writing and that it appears Mr. Kaller is not ready to close. Mr. Kaller stated that the beneficiaries are in two different countries. The Court stated that by the next calling of the case that it will expect a petition to approve further report on status of the administration to be on file, that the petition should address any remaining issues, and that it should also state how long it will take to close the estate.

At the conclusion of comments, the status on close of estate and status on increase of bond or filing waivers are continued to March 20, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. If a petition to approve further report on status of administration and bond waivers or bond are on file both status hearings will go off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Singh. Matter not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-07-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Kaller, via Zoom, for Bartholomew Murphy, Personal Representative; Agustin Pina, via Zoom, for Beneficiaries.

The court reminds Mr. Kaller that Examiner's notes have been pending since August. Mr. Kaller reports of having submitted documents to the probate referee and is waiting for a reply to confirm the value of the Estate's real property. The court advises counsel that an increased bond will be required unless waivers are filed.

After additional discussion, the court intends to take this matter off calendar and set the following status hearing dates, all on Jan-09-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204:

1) Status on increase of bond or filing of waivers
2) Status on filing final Inventory and Appraisal
3) Status on Close of Estate

The court instructs counsel that by the next calling, he is expected to file a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration which should include a status of accounting.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.
